# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      tag: main
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 3306
      name: mysql
      tag: main
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  gateways:
    - service-mesh-gateway  # replace with your gateway's name
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api1/v1
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.example.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: your-service
          port:
            number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases-vs
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  gateways:
    - service-mesh-gateway  # replace with your gateway's name
  tls:
    mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  http:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: external-database
          port:
            number: 3306
